embeds.title: 🎙️Morimens Prologue voice addition
embeds.description:
Voice lines added for prologue, "Faded Legacy - Final Chapter" stages 9-13!

Keepers who have completed the prologue's first clear can replay the prologue in "Investigation - Normal Mode".
#忘卻前夜 #morimens
